Sandbox_ATF_TreeChance_tooltip: Base chance for tree growth on valid outdoor ground.
Sandbox_ATF_TreeScale_tooltip: Scales the final tree density up or down.
Sandbox_ATF_BushChance_tooltip: Base chance for bush growth on valid outdoor ground.
Sandbox_ATF_BushScale_tooltip: Scales the final bush density up or down.
Sandbox_ATF_GrassChance_tooltip: Base chance for natural groundcover on outdoor ground.
Sandbox_ATF_BaseOverlayChance_tooltip: Fallback base chance used by overgrowth systems.
Sandbox_ATF_FlowerChance_tooltip: Reserved for a later flower pass.
Sandbox_ATF_RoadGrassRatio_tooltip: Higher values favor grass on roads.
Sandbox_ATF_RoadMossRatio_tooltip: Higher values favor leaf/debris style growth on roads.
Sandbox_ATF_SidewalkOverlayChance_toolti: How often sidewalks and pavement receive overgrowth.
Sandbox_ATF_SidewalkGrassRatio_tooltip: Higher values favor grass on sidewalks.
Sandbox_ATF_SidewalkMossRatio_tooltip: Higher values favor leaf/debris style growth on sidewalks.
Sandbox_ATF_RoofOverlayChance_tooltip: How often flat roofs receive growth.
Sandbox_ATF_RoofLeafRatio_tooltip: Higher values favor leaf litter over grass on flat roofs.
Sandbox_ATF_VinesChance_tooltip: How often vines are attached to valid exterior walls and fences.
Sandbox_ATF_RandomTrashChance_tooltip: Reserved for the later trash pass.
Sandbox_ATF_TrashScale_tooltip: Reserved for the later trash pass.
Sandbox_ATF_noTreesOnRoad: No Trees on Roads or Pavement
Sandbox_ATF_noTreesOnRoad_tooltip: Prevents trees from spawning on detected roads and pavement.
